reviewed_items.reviewer_notes: Gate 2 (Trust Boundary) triggered: The cache inconsistency occurs in the validator's own block production path (broadcastAndReceiveDataColumns in proposer.go), which is a SEMI_TRUSTED component under local operator control. The issue arises from locally-produced data columns not updating the anti-equivocation cache. No untrusted (P2P) attack path was identified in Phase 03's analysis. Per BUG_BOUNTY_SCOPE.json, local_validator issues are out of scope (in_scope_for_bug_bounty: false). The attack scenario requires the validator to re-submit its own data through different paths, which is a self-inflicted operational issue rather than an external security vulnerability.
reviewed_items.spec_reference: Anti-equivocation cache must be updated for all imported data columns regardless of publishing.
